creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Hello!

 There is a new 0.2.3 version.
 
 New patch:

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/russian/rubygem-rutils/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.3
diff -u -r1.3 Makefile
--- Makefile	11 Apr 2007 20:12:04 -0000	1.3
+++ Makefile	26 Sep 2007 23:57:07 -0000
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/russian/rubygem-rutils/Makefile,v 1.3 2007/04/11 20:12:04 miwi Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	rutils
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.3
 CATEGORIES=	russian devel rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_RUBYFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
